meta.title: 教育哲学与终身学习
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on educational philosophy in Chinese: proverbs, aptitude-based teaching, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 교육 철학 담화: 속담, 맞춤형 교육, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「终身学习」(zhōngshēn xuéxí) means "lifelong learning".
explanation.ko: 「终身学习」(zhōngshēn xuéxí)는 '평생 학습'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「终身学习」是什么意思？(What does 终身学习 mean?)

explanation.en: This proverb means "teaching someone to fish is better than giving them a fish", emphasizing teaching methods over giving direct answers.
explanation.ko: 이 속담은 '물고기를 잡아주기보다 잡는 법을 가르치는 것이 낫다'는 뜻으로, 직접적 결과보다 방법을 가르치는 것의 중요성을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 「授人以鱼不如授人以渔」是什么意思？(What does this idiom mean?)
choices: 给人钱财不如给人食物
比起直接给予结果，教会方法更重要(teaching methods is more valuable than giving results directly)

explanation.en: 「因材施教」is an idiom meaning "to teach according to each student's aptitude".
explanation.ko: 「因材施教」는 '학생의 자질에 맞춰 가르치다'라는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「因材施教」是什么意思？(What does 因材施教 mean?)
choices: 因材施教(teaching according to individual aptitude)

explanation.en: 「求知欲」(qiúzhīyù) means "desire/thirst for knowledge".
explanation.ko: 「求知欲」(qiúzhīyù)는 '지적 호기심, 배움에 대한 갈망'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「求知欲」是什么意思？(What does 求知欲 mean?)

explanation.en: The core of educational philosophy usually involves cultivating independent thinking and the ability for lifelong learning.
explanation.ko: 교육 이념의 핵심은 보통 독립적 사고와 평생 학습 능력을 기르는 것을 포함한다.

questions.prompt: 「教育理念的核心」通常涉及什么？(What does the core of educational philosophy usually involve?)
choices: 培养独立思考与终身学习能力(cultivating independent thinking and lifelong learning ability)

explanation.en: 「终身学习」means "lifelong learning".
explanation.ko: 「终身学习」는 '평생 학습'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 在知识快速迭代的时代，___已经成为每个人的必备能力。(In an era of rapidly evolving knowledge, lifelong learning has become a necessary ability for everyone.)

explanation.en: This proverb emphasizes teaching methods over giving direct answers.
explanation.ko: 이 속담은 직접적인 답을 주기보다 방법을 가르치는 것을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 好的教育应该秉持___的理念，注重培养学生的思考能力，而非单纯灌输知识。(Good education should uphold the principle that "teaching methods is more valuable than giving results directly," focusing on cultivating students' thinking ability rather than simply cramming knowledge.)
choices: 给人钱财不如给人食物
授人以鱼不如授人以渔

explanation.en: 「因材施教」means "teaching according to individual aptitude".
explanation.ko: 「因材施教」는 '학생의 자질에 맞춰 가르치다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 每个学生的特点和潜力都不同，教育者应该___，而非一刀切。(Every student's characteristics and potential are different, educators should teach according to individual aptitude, rather than adopting a one-size-fits-all approach.)

explanation.en: 「求知欲」means "desire for knowledge".
explanation.ko: 「求知欲」는 '지적 호기심'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 保持旺盛的___是持续学习和成长的重要动力。(Maintaining a strong thirst for knowledge is an important driving force for continuous learning and growth.)

explanation.en: This confirms the core of educational philosophy as cultivating independent thinking.
explanation.ko: 이는 교육 이념의 핵심이 독립적 사고를 기르는 것임을 확인한다.

questions.prompt: 这位教育家认为，___应该是帮助学生学会如何学习，而非仅仅传授知识。(This educator believes that the core of educational philosophy should be helping students learn how to learn, not just imparting knowledge.)
choices: 培养独立思考与终身学习能力

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose".
explanation.ko: 「暴露」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 填鸭式教育的弊端___了当代教育改革的迫切性。(The drawbacks of cram-style education expose the urgency of contemporary educational reform.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求分数和排名，___不如注重培养学生的独立思考能力。(Rather than blindly pursuing scores and rankings, it's better to focus on cultivating students' ability to think independently.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个人___已经离开校园多年，___应该保持终身学习的习惯。(Even if a person has left school for many years, they should still maintain the habit of lifelong learning.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 这种教育理念之所以广受推崇，___是因为它真正尊重了每个学生的独特性。(The reason this educational philosophy is widely praised is precisely because it truly respects each student's uniqueness.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，___能够更好地适应不断变化的世界。(Once a person develops the habit of lifelong learning, they can better adapt to a constantly changing world.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，教育的意义___在于唤醒人内心深处的求知欲。(In the final analysis, the meaning of education still lies in awakening the deep thirst for knowledge within a person.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，家庭教育与学校教育___塑造了一个人的学习态度。(From this we can see that both family education and school education jointly shape a person's attitude toward learning.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，兴趣___是最好的老师，能激发持久的学习动力。(As everyone knows, interest is often the best teacher, able to inspire lasting motivation to learn.)

explanation.en: 「挖掘」(wājué) means "to unlock/dig out [potential]".
explanation.ko: 「挖掘」(wājué)는 '발굴하다, 이끌어내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这位老师善于___学生的潜力，帮助他们发现自己的天赋。(This teacher is skilled at unlocking students' potential, helping them discover their own talents.)

explanation.en: 「呵护」(hēhù) means "to nurture/tenderly protect".
explanation.ko: 「呵护」(hēhù)는 '소중히 보살피다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 真正的教育应该___学生的好奇心，而非扼杀它。(True education should protect students' curiosity, rather than stifling it.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 注重培养〜: 不如注重培养 (not 注重不如培养).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '注重培养〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如注重培养'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求分数和排名，注重不如培养学生的独立思考能力。(Rather than blindly pursuing scores and rankings, it's better to focus on cultivating students' ability to think independently.) — find the error
choices: 与其一味追求分数和排名，不如注重培养学生的独立思考能力。
与其一味追求分数和排名，注重不如培养学生的独立思考能力。
与其一味追求分数和排名，不如培养注重学生的独立思考能力。
与其一味追求分数和排名，注重培养不如学生的独立思考能力。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这种教育理念之所以广受推崇，因为是它真正尊重了每个学生的独特性。(The reason this educational philosophy is widely praised is precisely because it truly respects each student's uniqueness.) — find the error
choices: 这种教育理念之所以广受推崇，是因为它真正尊重了每个学生的独特性。
这种教育理念之所以广受推崇，因为是它真正尊重了每个学生的独特性。
这种教育理念之所以广受推崇，是它因为真正尊重了每个学生的独特性。
这种教育理念之所以广受推崇，它是因为真正尊重了每个学生的独特性。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，能够才更好地适应不断变化的世界。(Once a person develops the habit of lifelong learning, they can better adapt to a constantly changing world.) — find the error
choices: 一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，就能够更好地适应不断变化的世界。
一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，能够才更好地适应不断变化的世界。
一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，才能够更好地适应不断变化的世界。
一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，能够更好地才适应不断变化的世界。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其一味追求分数和排名，不如注重培养学生的独立思考能力 ("Rather than blindly pursuing scores and rankings, it's better to focus on cultivating students' ability to think independently").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其一味追求分数和排名，不如注重培养学生的独立思考能力' (점수와 등수만 좇느니 차라리 학생의 독립적 사고 능력을 기르는 데 주력하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其一味追求分数和排名，__________培养学生的独立思考能力。(Rather than blindly pursuing scores and rankings, it's better to focus on cultivating students' ability to think independently.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，就能够更好地适应不断变化的世界 ("Once a person develops the habit of lifelong learning, they can better adapt to a constantly changing world").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，就能够更好地适应不断变化的世界' (사람은 일단 평생 학습 습관을 기르면 끊임없이 변화하는 세상에 더 잘 적응할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦养成了终身学习的习惯，__________更好地适应不断变化的世界。(Once a person develops the habit of lifelong learning, they can better adapt to a constantly changing world.)
